output_text: a great deal of nonsense was talked about him, but I was too late.  She had already gone on to say that she had heard that he was a great talker, and that she was rather disappointed.  “I don’t see why he should be,” she added, “when he’s so obviously a bore.”  I was tempted to say that she was a bore, but I refrained.  “I don’t see why he should be,” she repeated, “when he’s so obviously a bore.”  I was tempted to say that she was a bore, but I refrained.  “I don’t
